title: Common-Brand
description: Add a cool brand for the Common-Sense modpack
body:
### Common-Brand

[![CodeFactor](https://www.codefactor.io/repository/github/craftish37/common-brand/badge)](https://www.codefactor.io/repository/github/craftish37/common-brand)

Common brand is a very simple misc mod used in [Common-Sense](https://modrinth.com/modpack/common-sense) modpack to edit the brand to "Common-Sense / QuiltMC"

Info : This mod can be removed from your modpack without any problem, keeping the default modloader brand

Need support ? Join the Discord [here](https://discord.gg/H8xZpfscCg)

[![NeyHost affiliation - Use promo code "CRAFTISH", save 30% on your first purchase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d6168a8195c89d3ae1c95c2fae55722923e712_0.webp)](https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=CRAFTISH)
